title: Visual Identity & Interaction Polish
summary: Strengthens visual identity, improves accessibility, and polishes interactions. The game gets a brand mark, better pin visibility, semantic wire colors, and smoother transitions between levels. Toolbox gates get color-coded to match canvas, font sizing gets a 14px floor with toggle, onboarding becomes non-blocking, clear circuit becomes undoable, sound gets micro-randomization, and challenge mode gates based on campaign progress.

tasks.description: Color-code toolbox gates to match their canvas gate type colors (AND=yellow, OR=cyan, NOT=red-orange, XOR=purple). Currently toolbox gates are all white text on dark background.
acceptance_criteria: Each toolbox gate element has a colored left border or text matching its GateTypes color
Toolbox AND gate shows yellow accent, OR shows cyan, NOT shows red-orange, XOR shows purple
Hover state still works and is visible against the new colors

tasks.description: Create a minimal brand mark / logo for Signal Circuit. SVG-based circuit icon that appears on splash screen, level select header, and could be used for share cards.
acceptance_criteria: A distinctive SVG logo replaces or augments the ⚡ emoji in the game title
Logo appears on level select screen header
Logo is clean, minimal, and circuit/signal themed
Logo renders crisp at all sizes

tasks.description: Improve pin visibility: larger pins (radius 5→7px), subtle breathing animation on unconnected pins, better contrast against breadboard background.
acceptance_criteria: Pin circles are visibly larger (7px radius instead of 5px)
Unconnected pins show a subtle pulsing/breathing animation
Pins are clearly visible against the breadboard background
Connected pins look distinct from unconnected pins

tasks.description: Set a global minimum font size of 14px and add a font size toggle (Normal/Large/Extra Large) in settings on level select screen.
acceptance_criteria: No text element in the game is below 14px (verify key elements)
A font size toggle appears in the settings row on level select
Toggle cycles through Normal/Large/Extra Large
Selection persists via localStorage
Truth table, level descriptions, and status bar scale appropriately

tasks.description: Make onboarding tooltips non-blocking: click anywhere to dismiss (not just the dismiss button), non-modal so players can interact with the circuit while tooltip is visible.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking anywhere on the page dismisses the onboarding tooltip
Players can interact with the circuit (place gates, draw wires) while tooltip is visible
Tooltip does not block canvas interaction
Dismiss button still works as before

tasks.description: Implement semantic wire color assignment: all wires carrying the same signal (from the same source pin) share a color, instead of colors assigned by creation order.
acceptance_criteria: Wires from the same output pin share the same color
Wires from different output pins get different colors
Colors reset properly on level load / circuit clear
Wire colors still override to signal colors during simulation

tasks.description: Make Clear Circuit a single undoable action. Ctrl+Z after clear should restore the entire circuit (all gates and wires).
acceptance_criteria: Pressing Clear Circuit, then Ctrl+Z restores all gates and wires
The undo action correctly restores wire connections
Multiple undos after clear don't cause errors
Redo after undo-of-clear re-clears the circuit

tasks.description: Add level transition choreography: when loading a new level, brief power-down effect on old circuit (fade out), then power-up on new level (fade in with initialization animation).
acceptance_criteria: Transitioning between levels shows a brief visual transition
Power-down: canvas fades/dims briefly
Power-up: new level fades in with a subtle initialization effect
Transition is fast (~400ms total) and doesn't feel sluggish

tasks.description: Sound micro-randomization is already partially implemented (_randomize method exists). Extend it: apply ±5% frequency variance and ±10% duration variance to ALL sound effects that don't already use it.
acceptance_criteria: playClick, playWireDisconnect, playButtonClick, playFail, playSuccess all use _randomize for key frequency params
No two consecutive plays of the same sound are identical
Sounds still feel correct and recognizable despite variance

tasks.description: Challenge mode difficulty should scale based on campaign progress. Don't show 4-input challenges to players who haven't completed Chapter 2. Gate the input slider max.
acceptance_criteria: Input slider max is 2 until Chapter 1 is complete
Input slider max increases to 3 after Chapter 1 complete
Input slider max increases to 4 after Chapter 2 complete
Output slider similarly gated (max 1 until Chapter 2 complete)
If player has full progress, all options available

testing_focus: Toolbox gate colors match canvas gate colors visually
Pin breathing animation runs smoothly and doesn't kill performance
Font size toggle persists and applies globally
Clear Circuit undo restores exact circuit state
Level transitions feel smooth not janky
Challenge mode gating works correctly based on progress
Semantic wire colors group correctly by source pin
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
